title: Neural Speech Synthesis: Text-to-Speech with Tacotron
author: Voice Harper
Audio ML Engineer
description: Generate human-like speech with neural TTS—but deepfakes become indistinguishable
content:
Neural TTS models generate natural-sounding speech from text.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Voice Theft Epidemic (2034)](/docs/articles/voice-theft-2034)
